case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MIGUEL ANGEL QUEZADA CASTANEDA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MIGUEL ANGEL QUEZADA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MIGUEL ANGEL QUEZADA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MIGUEL ANGEL QUEZADA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $22.00) SERVED JAN-26-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MIGUEL ANGEL QUEZADA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $97.74 AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MIGUEL ANGEL QUEZADA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-04-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MIGUEL ANGEL QUEZADA
ORDER RE:CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING CALENDAR OF APR. 02, 2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER HEARING THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT GRANTED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBIT RETAINED BY THE COURT. JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO APR-02-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MIGUEL ANGEL QUEZADA CASTANEDA DID NOT APPEAR. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS NEEDED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
